hotels.name: El Parche Bilinga Beachside
hotels.description_fr:
Comfortable Accommodation: El Parche Bilinga Beachside in Gold Coast offers a spacious apartment with a balcony, terrace, and garden views. The property features a sauna, fitness centre, and free WiFi, ensuring a relaxing and connected stay.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy air-conditioning, Infrared sauna and Ice-Bath., and a fully equipped kitchen with a dishwasher and microwave. Additional facilities include a fitness room, outdoor seating area, family rooms, and barbecue facilities.
Prime Location: Located a few steps from Bilinga Beach and 4 km from Currumbin Wildlife Sanctuary, the apartment provides easy access to local attractions.
